Attack_Texts: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.
FlavorText: Often found in forests and grasslands. It has a sharp, toxic barb of around two inches on top of its head.
The quills on its head are usually soft. When it flexes them, the points become so hard and sharp that they can pierce rock.
Eating a twig fills it with energy, and its roomy ears give vent to air hotter than 390 degrees Fahrenheit.
It secretes flexible bubbles from its chest and back. The bubbles reduce the damage it would otherwise take when attacked.

FlavorText: It raises its tail to check its surroundings. The tail is sometimes struck by lightning in this pose.
Opponents who stare at the flashing of the light-emitting spots on its body become dazed and lose their will to fight.

Attacks_JSON: [{"name": "Continuous Slash", "cost": ["Metal", "Colorless"], "convertedEnergyCost": 2, "damage": "30×", "text": "Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads."}]
Attack_Texts: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.
FlavorText: Apparently this Pokémon is born when a departed spirit inhabits a sword. It attaches itself to people and drinks their life force.
It has an active, playful nature. Many women like to frolic with it because of its affectionate ways.
To entangle its opponents in battle, it extrudes white threads as sweet and sticky as cotton candy.
They use their large ears to dig burrows. They will dig the whole night through.

FlavorText: These friendly Pokémon send signals to one another with beautiful chirps and tail-feather movements.
